case_title: JING ZHANG VS. HENRY JIAN GUO WANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-06-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JING ZHANG & DEFENDANT HENRY JIAN GUO WANG. BANNIE CHOW WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MS. ZHANG. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER AMY LO ASSISTED MR. WANG DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. HONG ZHOU, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETERS SHALL BE PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES TO ASSIST THEM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 9, 2017 AT 3:30 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL. PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO HENRY WANG (OWNER OF EASTERN HARMONY CLINIC) AND JIANGUO WANG (LICENSE #1087OPERATOR OF EASTERN HARMONY CLINIC) BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-28-2016 AT 5:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2016 - CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT: HENRY JIAN GUO WANG. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST HER CLAIMS AGAINST NAMED DEFENDANTS HENRY WANG (OWNER OF EASTERN HARMONY CLINIC) AND JIANGUO WANG (LICENSE #1087 OPERATOR OF EASTERN HARMONY CLINIC) ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER FRANCES HA. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AI DONG NI, AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-15-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TRIAL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER FRANCES HA. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE MARCH 28, 2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT WANG, HENRY (OWNER OF EASTERN HARMONY CLINIC)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-06-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CONTINUED TRIAL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT HENRY JIAN GUO WANG & CROSS-DEFENDANT JING ZHANG. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN SPEAKING AMY LO ASSISTED MR. WANG AT TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. BANNIE CHOW WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MS. ZHANG. HONG ZHOU, A WITNESS FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETERS SHALL BE PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES TO ASSIST THEM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-21-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, JING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANG, HENRY JIAN GUO PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO A PARTNERSHIP, MASSAGE/ACUPUNCTURE BUSINESS IN WHICH BOTH INVESTED MONEY AND TIME BUT UNEQUALLY AND WITH NO AGREEMENT THAT ONE REIMBURSE THE OTHER IN DISSOLUTION OF THE PARTNERSHIP. THE BUSINESS FAILED AFTER SEVERAL MONTHS FOLLOWING CITATIONS FROM THE SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH DEPARTMENT OVER PERMIT AND LICENSING ISSUES RELATING TO THE MASSAGE BUSINESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
